titleStmt.title: SII 9.546: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 546. (A.R. No. 178 of 1910.) ON A SECOND SLAB SET UP NEAR THE POND WEST OF THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is damaged and is of the same date and reign as A.R. No. 175 of 1910, above. It specifies the plots of land which were given to Annadāni-Voḍeya in charge of the Jaṅgama-satra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaru
ṣa 1454 neya saṁda naṁdanasaṁvatsarada jē
ṣṭha śu 5 lli śrīmaṁnumahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa Accyutarāyama
hārāyaru rājyaṁgaivalli kāṇikeya kaṁpadēvara
saṁṇanavara nirūpadiṁda beṇiyanavara muṁdiṭṭu nā
U hadināru sthānikara muṁdiṭṭu gājinūra sthaḷava pā
rupatyava māḍuva koṁḍappayyanavaru sēnubōva gu
ṁmaṭṭayyanavaru siddappavoḍeyaru vāsudēva baguttayada
voḷagada baḍugoṁganāḍa muṁdiṭṭu kapilā kau
ṁḍinī saṁgama kṣētradalu naṁjaluguḍa śrīnaṁ
juṁḍēśvaradēvara saṁnidhiyali naḍavaṁtha chatrada Eṟaganahaḷḷi
ya grāmadalli 2 bhāgavāgi yanu jaṁgama chatrada naṁ
ja dēvara ma kkaḷu bhōgana voḍeyara makkaḷu
Aṁnadānivoḍeyarige koṭṭa geya vivara Eṟaganaha
ḷiya grāmadalli paḍuvaṇa
risagitti kuṁmari baḍagaṇa mēre mūḍa
lu cellataḷavobbe mēre Āladamara mariyakka
daṁḍina dāriya kālobbe mēreyāgi muṁde
ḍaṁbaṭṭu huttina
Aṁkaṇa saṁ keṟeya ṟana hola
bhāgi 10 nū Aṟeya grāmadalū baḍagaṇakēri paḍuvalu karadē
la hākida yelle mēre sahavāgi baḍagalu saluvudu keṟeya
karagaḷa tōṭa saribhāge saluvudu baḍagarataṭana yelle mēre muḍalu maṁci
na teṁkalu maṟehō varu mēreyāgi saluUdu brammaṇabhāgeya
sarisama bhāgeya sīmeyanu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi Anubhavisikoṁbiri
yeṁdu baṁdu svarucikeyiṁdoḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭa kalluśāsana voṁdu
rige koḷḷaṁthā sakṣigaḷu honnaṇagauḍaru parvvatigauḍaru gaya
naṁjuṁḍayyaTwo lines after this are badly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 9.546 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
